User.title: User Profile
User.description: Stores user-specific profile information and preferences.

photoURL.description: URL to the user's profile picture.

lastLogin.description: The last time the user logged in.

Dataset.title: Saved Dataset
Dataset.description: Represents a CSV dataset uploaded by the user.

content.description: The raw CSV content (or a reference to it).

schema.description: The inferred schema of the dataset.

rowCount.description: Number of rows in the dataset.

SearchHistory.title: Search History
SearchHistory.description: Stores a record of a natural language query and the resulting chart configuration.

id.description: Unique ID for the history entry.

query.description: The natural language query entered by the user.

datasetId.description: The ID of the dataset used for this query.

chartConfig.description: The resulting chart configuration from Gemini.

/users/{userId}/datasets/{datasetId}.description: Collection of datasets uploaded by the user.

/users/{userId}/history/{historyId}.description: Collection of search queries and analysis results for the user.
